comment: oxo-game-fn build. rootDir is the lambda root so the shared token/ DOMAIN module (token.ts + token/adapters/ssm-secret-source.ts) compiles INTO games/dist alongside the handler. Because token/ is a sibling of games/, tsc nests the handler at games/dist/games/handler.js and token at games/dist/token/* — the CDK handler entry for oxo-game-fn must therefore be 'games/handler.handler' (asset path games/dist unchanged). See engineer A1 return / build-coverage note.
